state.applied_project_goal: створити APF validation-ready Ordo project factory
domain_model_notes: APF accepts guided process design context

auto_svg_generation_policy.reason: avoid visual noise during node-by-node runtime review

incremental_yaml_update_policy.reason: keep confirmed decisions durable without paying full validation cost after every small step

full_project_validation_policy.purpose: final integrity gate before declaring the project coherent and ready

node_decision_gate_policy.applies_to: each current node shown by N_TREE_DEPTH_FIRST_REVIEW_LOOP

control_action_bookkeeping_policy.unreviewed_sibling_branches_mean: real tree branches that still require future traversal
control_action_bookkeeping_policy.not_selected_control_actions_mean: available runtime actions intentionally not chosen for the current node decision
control_action_bookkeeping_policy.blocked_until_ready_actions_mean: runtime actions visible to the user but not currently allowed until readiness conditions pass

process_design_review_rendering_policy.purpose: Make the user-facing process-design review state explicit, durable, and not dependent on assistant memory.

context_shift_notices.tree_traversal: Зараз ми рухаємось по дереву / traversal, а не приймаємо review-рішення по вузлу.
context_shift_notices.node_review_decision: Зараз це review-рішення по показаному вузлу, не вибір гілки дерева.
context_shift_notices.tree_branch_selection: Зараз це вибір гілки дерева / traversal-рішення, не виправлення показаного вузла.
context_shift_notices.execution_gate: Зараз це execution/validation gate, не conceptual review вузла.

package_composition_policy.archive_blocking_behavior: final archive cannot be assembled when gate status is failed or not_run
package_composition_policy.staleness_policy_rc2: version/model metadata and manifest/content checks; checksum-based staleness may be added later

state.execution_mode_reason: Hybrid mode selected for process creation/refinement: runtime controls traversal/state/gates while authoring mode applies scoped process changes.

execution_mode_declaration.reason: Hybrid mode selected for APF process creation/refinement.
warnings: authoring changes invalidate affected compiled targets until recompilation is performed

state.compile_utility_profile: dev/source-authoring helper; runtime wrapper remains traversal-safe and does not expose authoring compile as a guided runtime command
state.declared_package_profile: hybrid/full-dev source package plus compiled-runtime runtime profile

program_contract_summary.package_profile: hybrid/full-dev source package plus compiled-runtime runtime profile

required_fields.value_preview: Hybrid mode selected for process creation/refinement: runtime controls traversal/state/gates while authoring mode applies scoped process changes.
створити APF validation-ready Ordo project factory
